assumptions: The intragroup dividend has already been recognised as a receivable/payable and is a foreign-currency-denominated monetary item between group entities with different functional currencies.
The assessment is at the level of consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The fact pattern concerns hedge accounting for foreign currency risk on a recognised monetary item in consolidated financial statements, which maps to the IFRS fair value hedge model.
